Need one minimal human recovery card and one resume command.
tasks.interrupt_only_if: 仅在 GitHub 登录/授权、token 配置、ops repo remote 创建、satellite 首次接入、Feishu 治理链接配置时打断。
tasks.next_action: 保持 ai-task-ops 的日常 emit / aggregate / audit 节奏；后续再把 shadow bootstrap 替换成真实独立外部端。
tasks.result_summary: Recovered the transport line: repo reachable over git_ssh, governance Feishu link validated, and satellite-01/02 shadow bootstrap sources each completed one full emit. Local closure completed.

tasks.interrupt_only_if: 仅在 GitHub 登录/授权、token 配置、ops repo remote 创建、satellite 首次接入、Feishu 治理链接配置时打断。

tasks.result_summary: Human boundary cleared: the ops repo is reachable, the governance Feishu link is configured, and this recovery round accepts same-machine shadow bootstrap for satellite-01 and satellite-02.

tasks.title: 在边界补齐后恢复 transport 执行链与分派包
verification_target: Need remote_reachable = true and github_backend != none before continuing.
Need satellite-01 and satellite-02 to be registered before full emit.
tasks.interrupt_only_if: 若 GitHub auth、repo ownership 或 satellite 首次接入仍缺失，则继续等待人类边界。
tasks.next_action: 等待下游技能或人工接手；当前本地闭环可继续。
tasks.result_summary: No registered runner was available; a tracked handoff packet was prepared instead.

tasks.title: 在恢复后执行验真、hub audit 与 closure 判定
verification_target: Need at least one real cross-end emit or a new explicit blocker.
Need transport-status, hub audit, and active-threads refreshed after recovery.
tasks.interrupt_only_if: 仅在恢复后出现新的真实人类边界时打断。
tasks.next_action: 等待下游技能或人工接手；当前本地闭环可继续。

抽出 agency engineering hardening template，并把 agency-engineering-backend-architect 加厚成第三个 workflow 样板，接回 AI大管家 治理闭环。
验证人类反馈闭环
验证人类反馈闭环
同步外部 skill 评估能力到 live AI大管家，并验证 wechat-skills 真实样本评估闭环
把 agency-engineering-rapid-prototyper 从 persona 加厚成可验证 workflow 样板，并补齐 AI大管家 路由命中。
把 agency-engineering-frontend-developer 从 persona 加厚成页面实现包 workflow 样板，并补齐 AI大管家 路由边界。
验证 close-task 默认闭环下限
完成 Aily 登录取样、自托管三百年周期仪表盘 spec 与 OSS 选型文档，并验证取样工件生成
完成新 Mac Codex 迁移工具链与仓库准备
帮我做一个需要少打扰、要看 token 和时间预算的多 agent 任务治理方案
落地 AI龙虾训练营 v1 交付包
把 AI大管家 封装成像 Get 一样可安装的 OpenClaw 技能包，暴露最小接口，并补飞书小龙虾使用攻略
抽取飞书交付知识库 私教服务/学员信息 子树正文与结构，并映射到 CBM 交付链
康波 dashboard 收尾施工：完成同主表专题表卡铺设并识别跨表/图表配置边界
继续 CBM 评估：从 25年冲1000万 工作簿抽取私域/交付/用户分析证据，并回填原力战略 CBM 判断
将康波 dashboard 阶段评估写回 AI大管家 与 feishu-dashboard-automator 制度层
腾讯会议 export_media 到 external_transcribe 链路接入
读取原力战略 Feishu wiki 缓存与 25年冲1000万 历史业务数据盘，完成 CBM 证据补强与评估增量分析
在 Codex 上实施 MCP 首批采纳并验证配置生效
为【原力龙虾】建立首批知识分类规则并抽取第一批核心 knowledge_items
腾讯会议真实样本闭环与探测修复
收口原力星球公用知识库源 Phase 1，并搭起 Phase 2 knowledge_items 分类骨架
验真并登记原力星球公用知识库 Feishu wiki 源链接
完成 Palantir 研究包向原力OS operational ontology v0 规范与实施拆解的转译，并纳入治理线程
实现腾讯会议分享页探测器、治理入库和 CLI 入口

skills.name: openai-docs
skills.title: openai-docs
skills.role: Use when the user asks how to build with OpenAI products or APIs and needs up-to-date official documentation with citations, help choosing the latest model for a use case, or explicit GPT-5.4 upgrade and prompt-upgrade guidance; prioritize OpenAI docs MCP tools, use bundled references only as helper context, and restrict any fallback browsing to official OpenAI domains.

skills.name: skill-creator
skills.title: skill-creator
skills.role: Guide for creating effective skills. This skill should be used when users want to create a new skill (or update an existing skill) that extends Codex's capabilities with specialized knowledge, workflows, or tool integrations.

skills.name: skill-installer
skills.title: skill-installer
skills.role: Install Codex skills into $CODEX_HOME/skills from a curated list or a GitHub repo path. Use when a user asks to list installable skills, install a curated skill, or install a skill from another repo (including private repos).

skills.name: business-structure-designer
skills.title: business-structure-designer
skills.role: 当用户要设计业务系统、飞书多维表结构、业务主表、阶段表、机制表、证据表，或把粗糙 Excel 和现有表重构成业务系统时触发。

skills.name: chatgpt-apps
skills.title: chatgpt-apps
skills.role: Build, scaffold, refactor, and troubleshoot ChatGPT Apps SDK applications that combine an MCP server and widget UI. Use when Codex needs to design tools, register UI resources, wire the MCP Apps bridge or ChatGPT compatibility APIs, apply Apps SDK metadata or CSP or domain settings, or produce a docs-aligned project scaffold. Prefer a docs-first workflow by invoking the openai-docs skill or OpenAI developer docs MCP tools before generating code.

skills.name: cloudflare-deploy

skills.title: design-feishu-bitable-dashboards

skills.name: doc
skills.title: doc

skills.name: feishu-bitable-bridge
skills.title: feishu-bitable-bridge

skills.name: feishu-dashboard-automator

skills.name: feishu-km

skills.name: feishu-open-platform

skills.name: get-biji-transcript

actions.title: 处理技能治理动作候选
发布治理总览衍生报告

decision_records.title: 将 完成 Palantir 研究包向原力OS operational ontology v0 规范与实施拆解的转译，并纳入治理线程 设为 G1 当前一号实现线程
decision_records.decision_summary: Operational ontology v0 is the current G1 implementation priority.
decision_records.rationale: Move from Palantir research into schema, action, policy, writeback, and audit implementation.

decision_records.title: 处理外部高价值线索
decision_records.rationale: x-reader 当前被评为 watch，值得纳入本地 adoption queue。

decision_records.title: 加厚高频 agency 技能
decision_records.decision_summary: 加厚高频 agency 技能
decision_records.rationale: 当前有 56 个 agency 角色型 skill，很多更像 persona，而不是可验证的工作流。

decision_records.title: 处理重复和边界冲突
decision_records.rationale: 当前已经出现重复 description 和相邻 skill 边界不够利落的问题。
